[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / resetShader

# Method: resetShader()

```ts
resetShader(): void;
```

Reset the current shader to the default solid color shader.

This clears both the active shader and any accumulated uniforms set via [setUniform](setUniform.md).
Equivalent to calling `shader(null)`.

## Returns

`void`

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="resetShader" encoded-code="--" />
